title: Dream — expansive new house, disattached, haunted, creep as fuck
html:
TL;DR

  • One-paragraph dream log from October 15, 2020: about-to-tour a new house in the early morning — "the house was expansive as shut, but many things weren't to my liking. Confusing disattached, haunted, creep as fuck."
  • Sits in the COVID pandemic era dream cluster alongside 2020 04 30 dream water game 1987 crash, 2020 05 07 dream tribal fight, 2020 06 13 dream shooter prep, 2020 09 26 dream alexandria haircut card attack — Yahir was dreaming vividly and recording it during lockdown.
  • The "new house, expansive but wrong" image lands directly in the orbit of the later mom house by the river motivation — except inverted: this house is wrong, disattached, haunted. The right house has not yet been imagined.
  • "Disattached" — Yahir's spelling — surfaces a recurring vault-wide texture: the spaces he gets that aren't his feel hollow, even when objectively they are more.
  • Rare 2020-era note that's pure phenomenology — no todos, no plan — the format is an outlier and worth pattern-matching against later voice-memos and journal entries.

Source quote

"Just had a dream before I checked out my new house in the early morning. That the house was expansive as shut, but many things weren't to my liking. Confusing disattached, haunted, creep as fuck."

Open questions

  • What new house was Yahir actually checking out IRL on/around Oct 15, 2020? The dream is keyed to a real-life event.
  • Does "disattached" recur as a self-described state in later notes, or is this a one-off coinage?
  • Read against the mom house by the river arc, this is the anti-house — what does that contrast unlock?
